templates.text: You have exercisable ISO shares. Exercising starts the 1-year LTCG holding clock.
templates.detail: Incentive Stock Options (ISOs) can be exercised and held for 1 year after exercise + 2 years after grant to qualify for long-term capital gains treatment. AMT risk applies — consult a tax advisor for large exercises.
templates.successTemplate: Recorded exercise of {{input:shares}} ISO shares. LTCG holding period started — hold for 1 year + 2 years from grant for long-term treatment.

newActionsOnSuccess.text: ISO holding period tracker: {{input:shares}} shares exercised. Hold for 1 year (+ 2 years from grant) for LTCG treatment.
